extract: Veevee Volley (Japanese: ブイブイブレイク Vuivui Break) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. It is one of the signature moves and the partner power of the partner Eevee. It acts as a fifth move that can only be used by shaking the game controller when prompted by an animated icon of Eevee waving a Joy-Con.
